Joon Y. Kim

WIP: Akuthu

Apr 6, 2019

Akuthu

Summary

Akuthu is a skald of one of the Eziliari floating cities.

Questions

  • What does he look like?
  • Is “he” a he?
  • Does he have a partner?
  • What are the duties and taboos for the rank of skald?
  • What are the names of the floating cities?
